Done. Here's a summary of what was changed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`:

**Root cause:** The `#invoke-overlay.active` CSS used `align-items: stretch`, which expanded both columns to full viewport height. The portrait column then used `align-items: flex-end` internally, pushing the canvas to the bottom-left corner while the dialog sat center-right.

**Changes made:**

1. **`#invoke-overlay.active`** — changed from `align-items: stretch` to `align-items: center; justify-content: center...(truncated)
